title: How We Scaled Kimi K2.5 | Zhilin Yang's full GTC 2026 Keynote
summary: Zhilin Yang presented Kimi AI's approach to scaling the Kimi K2.5 model at GTC 2026. The keynote covers technical decisions and methodology behind achieving the model's performance at scale.
